title: cereus houlletii
intro: Cereus houlletii, also known as the "Dragon Fruit Cactus," is a species of cactus that belongs to the genus Cereus and is native to Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Cereus houlletii include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
